== Notes for [[Item:Q80674|Q80674]] ==

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=updike&id=I55890

•ID: I55890

•Name: Caius Julius MARIUS

•Sex: M

•Birth: ABT 155

Marriage 1 Pedania Pedanius FUSCUS b: ABT 157

Children

1. Mariana MINOR b: ABT 180

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
